name: Bug Report

labels: bug

---

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `...`
2. Then run `...`
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error output if any.

## Environment

- OS: (e.g., Ubuntu 24.04, Arch, Fedora 41)
- Shell: (output of `bash --version`)
- nf version: (output of `nf version`)
- System info: (output of `uname -a`)
- fzf installed: yes / no (output of `fzf --version` if yes)

## Additional Context

Any other information that might help debug the issue.
